pages.text: $(italic)Create: Steam 'n' Rails$() extends the rail system with quality-of-life and variety:$(br)$(li)More $(bold)bogey styles$() and sizes for different train looks.$(li)$(bold)Conductors$() — placeable caps/figures that can help manage trains.$(li)$(bold)Train whistles$(), coupling tweaks, and extra track decoration.
pages.title: Steam 'n' Rails

pages.text: None of it changes the core train rules — it makes large networks nicer to build and run. If you're laying serious track, it's the addon you'll feel most.$(br2)As always, Ponder scenes cover the exact placement of the new pieces.
pages.title: What It Adds
